title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Akshaya Private Limited is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
